mapper.select:
/* 일자별 유저별 픽업 현황 조회 */ SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(s.CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m') AS PICKUP_MONTH ,
s.USER_ID , u.NAME , COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_RESERVATIONS , COUNT(CASE WHEN s.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' THEN 1 END) AS PICKUP_COMPLETE /* 픽업 완료 */ , COUNT(CASE WHEN s.UPDATE_USER = 'BATCH' AND s.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'CANCEL' THEN 1 END) AS SYSTEM_CANCEL /* 시스템 취소 (배치 취소) */
, COUNT(CASE WHEN s.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'CANCEL' AND (s.UPDATE_USER IS NULL OR s.UPDATE_USER <> 'BATCH') THEN 1 END) AS USER_CANCEL /* 사용자 취소 (직접 취소) */
, COUNT(CASE WHEN s.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'RESERVATION' THEN 1 END) AS USER_RESERVATIONS FROM special_rsv_mst s JOIN user_mst u ON s.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE 1=1
AND DATE_FORMAT(s.CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m') BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
AND s.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%')
AND u.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
GROUP BY
DATE_FORMAT(s.CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m'),
s.USER_ID, u.NAME ORDER BY
PICKUP_MONTH DESC,
s.USER_ID ;
